app.name: Prompteer
app.tagline: Practice prompts, compare outputs, and learn from shared challenge runs.

home.title: Prompt challenge workspace
home.subtitle: Sign in with seeded demo users, run a coding prompt challenge, and complete a local checkout without external credentials.

login.title: Demo login
login.description: Enter through mock Google OAuth with admin, paid, or free seed accounts.

coding.title: Coding workspace
coding.description: Draft and run deterministic prompt feedback against seeded PS challenges.

billing.title: Billing checkout
billing.description: Create and complete a Stripe-shaped subscription checkout for the paid demo.
